title: Mekanism Unleashed
description: Various tweaks to Mekanism, ex. increased upgrade limits.
body:
This mod has(well… will have, maybe) various tweaks to Mekanism, increasing the limits of what you can do with its machines.

Current list of tweaks:
- Increased limit of speed and energy upgrades from 8 to 32 by default, after the machine reaches one operation per tick, it will start doing multiple operations at once.
- Config for allowing enchantability of Meka Armor/Tool, defaults to false, doesn't add enchantable item tags to the items, you'll have to do that yourself.


All changes can be configured, changes need a restart to apply.


Credits to [nin8995](https://modrinth.com/user/nin8995) for making [Mekanism Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-tweaks), which the increased upgrade limits was initially copied from, and then changed to work with NeoForge and newer Mekanism versions.
